subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained! Thou hast been afflicted with separation, and I am Separation and care not; I am the Separator and fear not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای واصل بفراق مبتلی شدی و انا الفراق و لا ابالی و انا المفرق و لا اخاف
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
